headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 26, 2026**
article:
The Cincinnati Reds pulled off a thrilling comeback to defeat the Detroit Tigers 8-9, led by Matt McLain's 2 home runs and 4 RBIs. The Baltimore Orioles dominated the Boston Red Sox 10-3, with Adley Rutschman contributing 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 6 RBIs. The Cleveland Guardians secured an 8-6 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, thanks to Angel Martínez's 2 hits, 2 home runs, and 4 RBIs.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Angel Chivilli (New York Yankees) and Eugenio Suárez (Cincinnati Reds), who have been placed on the injured list. Nathan Lukes (Toronto Blue Jays) and Caleb Thielbar (Chicago Cubs) are also out due to injuries. Edwin Uceta (Tampa Bay Rays) has been transferred to the 60-day injured list, while Ryan Feltner (Colorado Rockies) is on the 15-day injured list.

There have been several trades and roster moves, including the Toronto Blue Jays acquiring Willie MacIver from the Texas Rangers for cash. The Seattle Mariners traded Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for Ty Cummings, while the Colorado Rockies traded Nicky Lopez to the Chicago Cubs for cash. The Houston Astros traded Wilmy Sanchez to the New York Yankees for Braden Shewmake.

top_news.title: **Reds Come from Behind to Take 8-9 Win**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds rallied to defeat the Detroit Tigers 8-9 in a thrilling matchup. Matt McLain led the Reds' offense with 2 home runs and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Orioles Rout Red Sox 10-3**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles dominated the Boston Red Sox, winning 10-3 behind a strong performance from their offense. Adley Rutschman led the charge with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 6 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Guardians Take Down Blue Jays 8-6**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians secured an 8-6 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Angel Martínez leading the offense with 2 hits, 2 home runs, and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Rockies Edge Mets in Thrilling 4-3 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies secured a narrow win over the New York Mets, with Michael Lorenzen earning the win and Antonio Senzatela notching the save. Brett Baty led the Mets' offense with 2 hits, 2 RBI, and a key single that scored two runs.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Rout Orioles 17-1**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox dominated the Baltimore Orioles in a lopsided 17-1 victory. Garrett Crochet led the Red Sox pitching staff, while several players had standout performances at the plate.

top_news.title: **Mariners Pull Off Thrilling 11-9 Victory Over Cardinals**
top_news.summary: The Seattle Mariners secured a hard-fought 11-9 win over the St. Louis Cardinals, with multiple players contributing to the team's success. Cal Raleigh and Julio Rodríguez were among the key hitters for the Mariners.

top_news.title: **Yankees' Angel Chivilli Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: New York Yankees right-handed pitcher Angel Chivilli has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right shoulder discomfort, effective retroactive to April 23, 2026.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Acquire Catcher Willie MacIver**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays have bolstered their roster with the addition of catcher Willie MacIver, acquired from the Texas Rangers in a trade for cash.
